rounds.title: Foundation Chain
rounds.rawInstruction: Chain 11, turn and crochet to the second chain from hook.
rounds.summary: Foundation chain for the top case.

rounds.title: Round 1
rounds.rawInstruction: 9sc, 4sc in the next st, 8sc, 3sc in the last st. (24)
rounds.summary: Work around the foundation chain, placing increases at both ends.

rounds.title: Round 2
rounds.summary: Increase round to shape the case.

rounds.title: Round 3
rounds.summary: Work in front loop only with increases.

rounds.title: Round 4
rounds.summary: Increase round.

rounds.title: Round 5
rounds.summary: Single crochet around.

rounds.title: Change to white yarn
rounds.summary: Switch from yellow to white yarn.

rounds.title: Rounds 6-9
rounds.summary: Single crochet around for four rounds in white.

rounds.title: Finish off top case
rounds.rawInstruction: Finish, cut and hide the yarn.
rounds.summary: Fasten off and weave in the end for the top case.

rounds.title: Foundation Chain
rounds.rawInstruction: Chain 11, turn and crochet to the second chain from hook.
rounds.summary: Foundation chain for the bottom case.

rounds.title: Round 1
rounds.rawInstruction: 9sc, 4sc in the next st, 8sc, 3sc in the last st. (24)
rounds.summary: Work around the foundation chain, same as top case.

rounds.title: Round 2
rounds.summary: Increase round, same as top case.

rounds.title: Round 3
rounds.summary: Same as top case Round 3 but worked through both loops (no FLO).

rounds.title: Round 4
rounds.summary: Increase round, same as top case.

rounds.title: Rounds 5-7
rounds.summary: Single crochet around for three rounds.

rounds.title: Crochet 2sc more
rounds.rawInstruction: Do not cut the yarn, crochet 2sc more.
rounds.summary: Work two additional single crochets without cutting yarn to prepare for joining.

rounds.title: Join shells
rounds.rawInstruction: To connect 2 shells, use 10slst. FLO from the top shell, BLO from bottom shell.
rounds.summary: Join the top and bottom cases together using 10 slip stitches through front loop of top and back loop of bottom.

rounds.title: Ears
rounds.rawInstruction: 7sc in MR, do not join, just tie MR.
rounds.summary: Make ears by working 7 single crochets into a magic ring.

rounds.title: Round 1
rounds.summary: Start arms with 5 single crochets in a magic ring.

rounds.title: Rounds 2-3
rounds.summary: Single crochet around for two rounds.

rounds.title: Crochet on both sides
rounds.summary: Flatten and crochet 2sc through both sides to close.

rounds.title: Sew all parts
rounds.rawInstruction: Sew all parts, nose, eyes and cheeks to finish.
rounds.summary: Attach ears, arms, and embroider the nose, eyes, and cheeks.

materials: Needle and thread for sewing eyes, nose
